title: Allow board view permissions when using “Only edit assigned items
excerpt: Currently, when we set board permissions to “Only edit assigned items”, users can’t create or edit views. This is very limiting for workflows where item-level editing restrictions are needed, but users still need to filt…

posts.author: ripaus (Pablo)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, when we set board permissions to “Only edit assigned items”, users can’t create or edit views. This is very limiting for workflows where item-level editing restrictions are needed, but users still need to filter or visualize data properly
